declarations.name: PerspectivePanel
declarations.summary: A Perspective <perspective-workspace> as a web component, driven by a config synced over transports (Mode B: Perspective streams the data over its own websocket; transports carries only the config).

attributes.name: config
attributes.description: The Perspective config: {ws_url, tables, layout}. ws_url is the Perspective data websocket (an absolute ws[s]:// URL or a same-origin path); tables is informational (the workspace discovers tables over the socket); layout is the workspace layout + per-viewer view config. Re-setting it — a server push over transports — re-restores, so a new view/layout applies at any time.
